report.name: PENPRN_DEC_INSTANCE1_GA_EF_EE

dataSource.name: Q_1
dataSource.select: SELECT COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_DOMAIN_TYPE, COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_NAME, PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO||'-'||TO_CHAR( PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPL_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR'), PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO, REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID, DECODE(REG_INSURED.SEX, 'Α', 'του ασφαλισμένου ', 'Θ', 'της ασφαλισμένης ') DECODED_SEX, REG_INSURED.SURNAME||' '||REG_INSURED.NAME FULLNAME, REG_INSURED.FATHER_NAME, REG_INSURED.MOTHER_NAME, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE, REG_INSURED.amka_id, REG_INSURED.taxation_id, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES, COM_ORG_BRANCHES, PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_PRODUCTS, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION WHERE PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE=:P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_DOCUMENT_TYPE_APPL_CODE='00001' AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR=:P_APPL_YEAR AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID=PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE=:P_QC_PER_PRODINST AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE AND COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE;

dataItem.name: DECODED_SEX
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Reg Insured Sex Α Του Α

dataSource.name: Q_4
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR, MIN(TO_DATE(1||'/'||nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000))), MAX(TO_DATE(30||'/'||nvl(MONTH,1)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,1000))), SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL) FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.USE_FLG='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CATEGORY='2' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE GROUP BY PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE,COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR;

dataItem.name: MAX_TO_DATE_30_nvl_MONTH_1_nv2
dataItem.defaultLabel: Max To Date 30 Nvl Month 1 Nv2

dataDescriptor.expression: MAX ( TO_DATE ( 30 || '/' || nvl ( MONTH , 1 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 1000 ) ) )

dataItem.name: MIN_TO_DATE_1_nvl_MONTH_12_nv3
dataItem.defaultLabel: Min To Date 1 Nvl Month 12 Nv3

dataDescriptor.expression: MIN ( TO_DATE ( 1 || '/' || nvl ( MONTH , 12 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 4000 ) ) )

dataSource.name: Q_5
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE, PEN_RULES.CONDITION, PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE, PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM, PEN_RULES, PEN_QUERY_TYPES, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DECISION_YEAR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE=PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BEPD_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE AND PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QSUB_QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.TYPE='0' AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_RULES.RULE_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.RULE_RULE_CODE AND PEN_RULES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE = PEN_QUERY_TYPES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE AND PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG = 2

dataSource.name: Q_6
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE, PEN_RULES.CONDITION, PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG FROM PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE, PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM, PEN_RULES, PEN_QUERY_TYPES, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DECISION_YEAR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE=PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BEPD_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_CODE AND PEN_CC_PER_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QSUB_QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.TYPE='0' AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_RULES.RULE_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.RULE_RULE_CODE AND PEN_RULES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE = PEN_QUERY_TYPES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE AND PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG = 1

dataSource.name: Q_7
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE, REG_INSURED.SURNAME||' '||REG_INSURED.NAME, REG_INSURED.DATE_OF_BIRTH, PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_NAME, REG_INSURED.AMKA_ID AMKA_WIFE, REG_INSURED.TAXATION_ID TAXATION_WIFE FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS,PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES WHERE PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_DIRECT=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT=REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE!='00001' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE=PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_TYPE ORDER BY PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE

dataSource.name: Q_8
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='0' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00113'

dataSource.select: SELECT com_pension_institutions.pension_inst_name FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, com_pension_institutions WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00070' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :p_insured_id AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00010' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=com_pension_institutions.PENSION_INST_CODE(+)

dataSource.name: Q_26

dataSource.name: Q_28
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_ACCOUNT.QUAL_PENSION_RIGHT_DATE, PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.PAYMENT_END_DATE, PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE, PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, DECODE (PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.DEDUCT_FLG, NULL, 'ΠΛΗΡΗ', 'ΜΕΙΩΜΕΝΗ') FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_PRODUCTS, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS, PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST, PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QCPRODINS_QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE=PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.QC_PER_PRODINST_CODE AND PEN_QC_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID= PEN_ACCOUNT.INS_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DECISION_YEAR_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=PEN_ACCOUNT.DI_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE.DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO;

dataSource.select: SELECT TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR=:P_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY TMP_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_34
dataSource.select: SELECT SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL), MIN(TO_DATE(1||'/'||nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000))), LAST_DAY(MAX(TO_DATE(1||'/'||NVL(MONTH,1)||'/'||NVL(YEAR,1000)))) FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO= :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID= :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.USE_FLG='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL IS NOT NULL AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL!=0;

AND PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.REQUIRE_PENSION_FLAG='0'--ΔΕΝ ΧΡΕΙΑΖΕΤΑΙ ΝΑ ΠΑΙΡΝΕΙ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗ AND PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST.BUSS_EVENT_CODE=PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.BUSS_EVENT_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_QUAL_CAT.BE_PER_PRODINST_CODE=PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST.BE_PER_PRODINST_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE.BE_PER_QUAL_CATEGORY_CODE=PEN_BE_PER_QUAL_CAT.BE_PER_QUAL_CATEGORY_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_PER_BE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE.QUALIF_TERM_PER_BE_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR=:P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR= :p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:p_insured_id AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_TYPE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_FLG ='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR ='1' ;

dataSource.select: SELECT A.VALUE, A.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE A WHERE A.title_code='00368' AND A.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND A.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND A.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :p_dt_decision_year AND A.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND A.dec_fact_type_code IN ('00510','00511','00512','00513','00514') ORDER BY A.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE

dataSource.name: Q_52
dataSource.select: SELECT A.HEAVY_BONUS_ORG, A.HEAVY_BONUS_IND FROM PEN_ACCOUNT A WHERE A.ACCOUNT_NO= :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND A.USAGE_FLG='1'

dataSource.name: Q_54

dataSource.name: Q_55
dataSource.select: SELECT WORKING_INS_REDUCTION, WORK_INS_CHILD_INCR, DECODE(WORK_INS_SECTOR, 'Ι', ' ΣΤΟΝ ΙΔΙΩΤΙΚΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ','Δ','ΣΤΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ/ΕΥΡΥΤΕΡΟ ΔΗΜΟΣΙΟ ΤΟΜΕΑ','Α','ΜΕ ΑΥΤΟΑΠΑΣΧΟΛΗΣΗ',WORK_INS_SECTOR), DECODE(WORK_INS_SECTOR, 'Ι', ' 63 Ν.2676/99','Δ','8 Π. 14 Ν. 2592/98',WORK_INS_SECTOR), DECODE(WORK_INS_SECTOR, 'Ι', 'ΣΤΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΠΟΥ ΥΠΕΡΒΑΙΝΕΙ ΤΑ 733,68 ΕΥΡΩ','Δ','ΣΤΟ ΣΥΝΟΛΙΚΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ',WORK_INS_SECTOR), Work_Ins_Sector SECTOR, Excess_Amount, Initial_Amount, Final_Amount, Children_Num, LIMIT_AMOUNT_FOR_EXCESS FROM PEN_ACCOUNT_WORKING_INFO WHERE Account_No = :P_Acc_Account_No;

dataSource.name: Q_56
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT INDIRECT_ID, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE, REG_INSURED.SURNAME, REG_INSURED.NAME FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS WHERE PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :p_dt_dec_unit_code AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DECISION_YEAR_SR=:p_dt_decision_year AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_DIRECT=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.INS_INSURED_ID_INDIRECT=REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DEPENDANTS.PDT_DEPENDENCY_TYPE='00003'

dataSource.name: Q_57
dataSource.select: select DEBT_ID, DEDUCTION_PENSION_FACTOR, DOSAGE_AMOUNT, TOTAL_DEDUCTION_AMMOUNT, b.descr, rownum num_debt from PEN_DEC_INSTANCE_DEBTS a, ppi_deduction_types b WHERE DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE= :p_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND DT_DECISION_YEAR= :p_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_DEC_INCR_SEC_NO and a.DEBT_ID=b.code(+) AND a.STATUS='1'

dataSource.name: Q_58
dataSource.select: SELECT AVERAGE_INCOME, to_char(MIN(TO_date(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy'), to_char(MAX(TO_date(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy'), sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME,0)), TOTAL_YEARS, ((sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0))*25) /sum(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0))) INFLATED_2, ((sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)+NVL(RETRO_AMT_INFLATED,0))*25)/sum(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0))) INFLATED_3, sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)+NVL(RETRO_AMT_INFLATED,0)) INFLATED_1, POSOSTO_ANAPL, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT, TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB, NVL(POSOSTO_ANAPL,0)+ NVL(ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB,0) , SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)) FROM PEN_CALC_ADAPOD_RES_EE WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND AYTOT_TMHM_FLG = '1' --ΑΥΤΟΤΕΛΕΣ GROUP by AVERAGE_INCOME, TOTAL_YEARS,POSOSTO_ANAPL, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT,TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB;

dataDescriptor.expression: ( ( sum ( NVL ( MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED , 0 ) + NVL ( RETRO_AMT_INFLATED , 0 ) ) * 25 ) / sum ( NVL ( MONTH_DAYS , 0 ) ) )
( ( sum ( NVL ( MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED , 0 ) ) * 25 ) / sum ( NVL ( MONTH_DAYS , 0 ) ) )

dataSource.name: Q_59
dataSource.select: SELECT INITIAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT, STAY_GREECE_YEARS, DENOM_OMOGENON, DECODE( DENOM_OMOGENON, 40, NULL, 'ΑΡΘ.73 Ν.4915/22)') OMOG_LAW, INSURANCE_YEARS, INS_YEARS_REDUCTION, STAY_GR_YEARS_REDUCTION, AGE_LIMIT_REDUCTION, FINAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT, DISABIL_PENSION_REDUCTION FROM PEN_CALC_NATIONAL_RES_EE WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND AYTOT_TMHM_FLG = '1' -- AYTOTELES

dataSource.select: SELECT LABOR_ACCIDENT_FLG FROM PEN_CALC_NATIONAL_RESULTS WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO

dataSource.name: Q_61
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR, COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR, --TO_CHAR(MIN(TO_DATE(nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000),'MM/YYYY')),'MM/YYYY'), --TO_CHAR(MAX(TO_DATE(nvl(MONTH,1)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,1000),'MM/YYYY')),'MM/YYYY'), MIN(decode(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE ,'810',FROM_WORKING_DATE,'820',FROM_WORKING_DATE,'830',FROM_WORKING_DATE,'840',FROM_WORKING_DATE,TO_DATE(nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000),'MM/YYYY'))), --MAX(decode(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE --,'810',TO_WORKING_DATE,'820',TO_WORKING_DATE,'830',TO_WORKING_DATE,'840',TO_WORKING_DATE,TO_DATE(nvl(MONTH,1)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,1000),'MM/YYYY'))), MAX(decode(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE ,'810',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),'820',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),'830',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),'840',LAST_DAY(TO_WORKING_DATE),LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(nvl(MONTH,1)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,1000),'MM/YYYY')))), SUM(nvl(NOTICE_INSURANCE_DAYS,0)+nvl(NOTICE_INS_DAYS_INCR,0)) FROM PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES, COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES WHERE PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE and COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE=PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE AND COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.CVR_COVER_CODE IN ('ΚΣΙ', 'ΚΣΝ') AND ( nvl(NOTICE_INSURANCE_DAYS,0) != 0 OR nvl(NOTICE_INS_DAYS_INCR,0) != 0) AND 1 = CASE WHEN ( ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE_DA = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR_DA = :P_APPL_YEAR and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO_DA = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PARALLEL_FLG,'0') = '0' ) -- DIADOXIKI THEN 1 WHEN NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.SOURCE_ORIGIN,'2') = 2 -- AFORA PERIPTOSEIS SYGXWNEFTHENTWN APO OTHONH ATHANASIOU and PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.COMMIT_FLG = 2 THEN 1 WHEN NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.SOURCE_ORIGIN,'2') = '2' and :P_HAS_PREPARE_PROTOCOLS = 0 and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE IS NULL and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR IS NULL and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO IS NULL -- AYTOMATOPOIHMENES/PISTOPOIHMENOI XVRIS PROTOCOLS THEN 1 WHEN NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.SOURCE_ORIGIN,'2') IN ('1','2','4','3','7') and :P_HAS_PREPARE_PROTOCOLS > 0 and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO -- AYTOMATOPOIHMENES/PISTOPOIHMENOI THEN 1 ELSE 0 END /*AND 1 = CASE ---διαδοχικη να εχει πρωτοκολλα ιδια με της αποφασης WHEN ( ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE_DA = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR_DA = :P_APPL_YEAR and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND ( PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO_DA = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO and PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO_DA IS NOT NULL ) AND NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PARALLEL_FLG,'0') = '0' ) THEN 1 ---οταν δεν ειναι διαδοχικη WHEN NVL(PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.SOURCE_ORIGIN,'2') = 2 THEN 1 WHEN ( ((PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE OR PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_ORGBRA_CODE IS NULL) AND (PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR OR PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_YEAR IS NULL) AND (PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO OR PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.PROTOCOL_NO IS NULL)) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END */ ---23/9/2024 ALLAGH GIA DIPLES HMERES KAI THA BAINOUN PANTA PROTOKOLLA ME SOURCE ORIGIN = 2 ENW STIS AUTO THA PAIZEI ME TIS ALLES TIMES GROUP BY PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE,COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_DESCR;

dataItem.defaultLabel: Min Decode Pen Prepare Days In

dataItem.name: MAX_DECODE_PEN_PREPARE_DAYS_IN
dataItem.defaultLabel: Max Decode Pen Prepare Days In

dataSource.name: Q_63
dataSource.select: SELECT FROM_WORKING_DATE,TO_WORKING_DATE FROM PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES, COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES WHERE PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_OPS.PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE=COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES.TRANS_TYPE and COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE=PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.COVCOD_COVERAGE_CODE and COM_COVERS_PER_COVERAGES.CVR_COVER_CODE='ΚΣΙ' AND PEN_PREPARE_DAYS.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE IN ('810','820','830','840');

dataSource.name: Q_64
dataSource.select: SELECT A.COUNTRY_CODE, C.COUNTRY_NAME, DECODE(A.COUNTRY_DOMAIN_FLG, '1', 'ΕΕ', '2', 'ΔΙΜ. ΣΥΜΒ.','3', 'ΕΛΒΕΤΙΑ-ΕΟΧ', '4', 'ΑΛΛΟ') COUNTRY_DOMAIN_FLG, A.EE_DS_TRANS_TYPE, D.EE_DS_TRANS_TYPE_NAME, DECODE(D.EE_DS_TYPE_DOMAIN, '1', 'ΔΙΑΜΟΝΗ', '2', 'ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗ') EE_DS_TRANS_TYPE_DOMAIN, A.TRANSFERRED_YEARS, A.PRODUCT_CODE, B.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, A.PENSION_AMT, A.PENSION_DATE_FROM, A.PENSION_DATE_TO, NVL(TOTAL_YEARS,0) + NVL(TOTAL_DAYS,0)/300 + NVL(YEARS,0) + NVL(MONTHS,0)/12 + NVL(DAYS,0)/300 + NVL(WEEKS,0)/52 + NVL(TRIMESTERS,0)/4 TOTAL_YEARS_OF_COUNTRY FROM PEN_EE_DS_DAYS_DTL A, PEN_PRODUCTS B, PEN_COUNTRIES C, PEN_EE_DS_TRANS_TYPES D WHERE A.COUNTRY_CODE = C.COUNTRY_CODE AND A.EE_DS_TRANS_TYPE = D.EE_DS_TRANS_TYPE AND A.PRODUCT_CODE = B.PRODUCT_CODE(+) AND A.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND A.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND A.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR AND A.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND A.STATUS = '1';

dataItem.name: EE_DS_TRANS_TYPE_DOMAIN
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode D Ee Ds Type Domain 1 Δ

dataDescriptor.expression: NVL ( TOTAL_YEARS , 0 ) + NVL ( TOTAL_DAYS , 0 ) / 300 + NVL ( YEARS , 0 ) + NVL ( MONTHS , 0 ) / 12 + NVL ( DAYS , 0 ) / 300 + NVL ( WEEKS , 0 ) / 52 + NVL ( TRIMESTERS , 0 ) / 4

dataSource.name: Q_65
dataSource.select: SELECT INITIAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT, STAY_GREECE_YEARS, DENOM_OMOGENON, DECODE( DENOM_OMOGENON, 40, NULL, 'ΑΡΘ.73 Ν.4915/22)') OMOG_LAW, INSURANCE_YEARS, INS_YEARS_REDUCTION, STAY_GR_YEARS_REDUCTION, AGE_LIMIT_REDUCTION, FINAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT, DISABIL_PENSION_REDUCTION, STAY_EE_DS_YEARS, NVL(STAY_GREECE_YEARS,0) + NVL(STAY_EE_DS_YEARS,0) STAY_ALL_YEARS, INSURANCE_YEARS_EE, NVL(INSURANCE_YEARS,0) + NVL(INSURANCE_YEARS_EE,0) INSURANCE_YEARS_ALL, THEORHT_AMOUNT, TMHMAT_AMOUNT FROM PEN_CALC_NATIONAL_RES_EE WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND AYTOT_TMHM_FLG = '2' -- TMHM

dataSource.name: Q_66
dataSource.select: SELECT AVERAGE_INCOME,THEORHT_AMOUNT, TMHMAT_AMOUNT, to_char(MIN(TO_date(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy'), to_char(MAX(TO_date(MONTH||'/'||YEAR,'MM/RRRR')),'mm/yyyy'), sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME,0)), TOTAL_YEARS, TOTAL_YEARS_GR, TOTAL_YEARS_EE, TOTAL_YEARS_GR_PLUS_EE, ((sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0))*25) /sum(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0))) INFLATED_22, ((sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)+NVL(RETRO_AMT_INFLATED,0))*25)/sum(NVL(MONTH_DAYS,0))) INFLATED_33, sum(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)+NVL(RETRO_AMT_INFLATED,0)) INFLATED_11, POSOSTO_ANAPL, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT, TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB, NVL(POSOSTO_ANAPL,0)+ NVL(ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB,0) , SUM(NVL(MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED,0)) FROM PEN_CALC_ADAPOD_RES_EE WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND AYTOT_TMHM_FLG = '2' --ΤΜΗΜΑΤΙΚΟ GROUP by AVERAGE_INCOME, THEORHT_AMOUNT, TMHMAT_AMOUNT,TOTAL_YEARS,POSOSTO_ANAPL, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT,TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB, TOTAL_YEARS_GR, TOTAL_YEARS_EE, TOTAL_YEARS_GR_PLUS_EE, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB;

dataItem.defaultLabel: To Char Min To Date Month Yea1

( ( sum ( NVL ( MONTH_INCOME_INFLATED , 0 ) + NVL ( RETRO_AMT_INFLATED , 0 ) ) * 25 ) / sum ( NVL ( MONTH_DAYS , 0 ) ) )

dataSource.select: SELECT T.LOGO FROM PEN_REPORTS_EFKA_LOGO T WHERE T.STATUS = '1'

dataSource.name: Q_70
dataSource.select: SELECT 5 ORD, C.COUNTRY_NAME, MIN(TO_DATE('01'||TRIM(LPAD(A.MONTH,2,0))||A.YEAR, 'DDMMRRRR')), MAX(LAST_DAY(TO_DATE('01'||TRIM(LPAD(A.MONTH,2,0))||A.YEAR, 'DDMMRRRR'))), NULL, NULL, SUM(NVL(INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL,0)), -- 3/7/2024 QUAL ANTI GIA CALC ROUND (SUM(NVL(INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL,0))/300,2) ETH_GR, D.TRANS_DESCR FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS A, COM_PENSION_INSTITUTIONS B, PEN_COUNTRIES C , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES D WHERE A.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND A.STATUS = '1' AND A.PENSION_INST_CODE = B.PENSION_INST_CODE AND B.CNTRY_COUNTRY_CODE = C.COUNTRY_CODE AND C.COUNTRY_CODE = 'GR' AND A.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE = D.TRANS_TYPe GROUP BY C.COUNTRY_NAME, 5, D.TRANS_DESCR

dataDescriptor.expression: MAX ( LAST_DAY ( TO_DATE ( '01' || TRIM ( LPAD ( A.MONTH , 2 , 0 ) ) || A.YEAR , 'DDMMRRRR' ) ) )

dataSource.name: Q_71
dataSource.select: SELECT 5 ORD, C.COUNTRY_NAME COUNTR_NAME_NOT_GR, MIN(TO_DATE('01'||TRIM(LPAD(A.MONTH,2,0))||A.YEAR, 'DDMMRRRR')) MIN_DATE_NOT_GR, MAX(LAST_DAY(TO_DATE('01'||TRIM(LPAD(A.MONTH,2,0))||A.YEAR, 'DDMMRRRR'))) MAX_DATE_NOT_GR, NULL, NULL, SUM(NVL(INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL,0)) QUAL_DAYS_NOT_GR, --- 3/7/2024 QUAL ANTI GIA CALC ROUND (SUM(NVL(INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL,0))/300 ,2) ETH_NOT_GR, --- 3/7/2024 QUAL ANTI GIA CALC D.TRANS_DESCR TRANS_DESCR_not_gr FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS A, COM_PENSION_INSTITUTIONS B, PEN_COUNTRIES C , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES D WHERE A.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND A.STATUS = '1' AND A.PENSION_INST_CODE = B.PENSION_INST_CODE AND B.CNTRY_COUNTRY_CODE = C.COUNTRY_CODE AND C.COUNTRY_CODE != 'GR' AND A.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE = D.TRANS_TYPE AND A.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE NOT LIKE 'AD%' GROUP BY C.COUNTRY_NAME, 5, D.TRANS_DESCR UNION SELECT 5 ORD, C.COUNTRY_NAME COUNTR_NAME_NOT_GR, NULL MIN_DATE_NOT_GR, NULL MAX_DATE_NOT_GR, NULL, NULL, SUM(NVL(INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL,0)) QUAL_DAYS_NOT_GR, --- 3/7/2024 QUAL ANTI GIA CALC ROUND (SUM(NVL(INSURANCE_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL,0))/300 ,2) ETH_NOT_GR, --- 3/7/2024 QUAL ANTI GIA CALC D.TRANS_DESCR TRANS_DESCR_not_gr FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS A, COM_PENSION_INSTITUTIONS B, PEN_COUNTRIES C , COM_INSURANCE_HISTORY_TYPES D WHERE A.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND A.STATUS = '1' AND A.PENSION_INST_CODE = B.PENSION_INST_CODE AND B.CNTRY_COUNTRY_CODE = C.COUNTRY_CODE AND C.COUNTRY_CODE != 'GR' AND A.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE = D.TRANS_TYPE AND A.INSHISTYP_TRANS_TYPE LIKE 'AD%' GROUP BY C.COUNTRY_NAME, 5, D.TRANS_DESCR

dataItem.name: MIN_DATE_NOT_GR
dataItem.defaultLabel: Min To Date 01 Trim Lpad A Mo1

dataDescriptor.expression: MIN ( TO_DATE ( '01' || TRIM ( LPAD ( A.MONTH , 2 , 0 ) ) || A.YEAR , 'DDMMRRRR' ) )

dataItem.name: MAX_DATE_NOT_GR
dataItem.defaultLabel: Max Last Day To Date 01 Trim 1

dataDescriptor.expression: MAX ( LAST_DAY ( TO_DATE ( '01' || TRIM ( LPAD ( A.MONTH , 2 , 0 ) ) || A.YEAR , 'DDMMRRRR' ) ) )

dataItem.name: QUAL_DAYS_NOT_GR
dataItem.defaultLabel: Sum Nvl Insurance Days Qual F1

dataSource.name: Q_72
dataSource.select: SELECT A.COUNTRY_CODE, C.COUNTRY_NAME, DECODE(A.COUNTRY_DOMAIN_FLG, '1', 'ΕΕ', '2', 'ΔΙΜ. ΣΥΜΒ.','3', 'ΕΛΒΕΤΙΑ-ΕΟΧ', '4', 'ΑΛΛΟ') COUNTRY_DOMAIN_FLG, A.EE_DS_TRANS_TYPE, D.EE_DS_TRANS_TYPE_NAME, DECODE(D.EE_DS_TYPE_DOMAIN, '1', 'ΔΙΑΜΟΝΗ', '2', 'ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗ') EE_DS_TRANS_TYPE_DOMAIN, A.TRANSFERRED_YEARS, A.PRODUCT_CODE, B.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, A.PENSION_AMT, A.PENSION_DATE_FROM, A.PENSION_DATE_TO, NVL(TOTAL_YEARS,0) + NVL(TOTAL_DAYS,0)/300 + NVL(YEARS,0) + NVL(MONTHS,0)/12 + NVL(DAYS,0)/300 + NVL(WEEKS,0)/52 + NVL(TRIMESTERS,0)/4 TOTAL_YEARS_OF_COUNTRY FROM PEN_EE_DS_DAYS_DTL A, PEN_PRODUCTS B, PEN_COUNTRIES C, PEN_EE_DS_TRANS_TYPES D WHERE A.COUNTRY_CODE = C.COUNTRY_CODE AND A.EE_DS_TRANS_TYPE = D.EE_DS_TRANS_TYPE AND A.PRODUCT_CODE = B.PRODUCT_CODE(+) AND A.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND A.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE = :P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND A.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR = :P_APPL_YEAR AND A.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND A.EE_DS_TRANS_TYPE = '00003' AND A.STATUS = '1';

dataDescriptor.expression: NVL ( TOTAL_YEARS , 0 ) + NVL ( TOTAL_DAYS , 0 ) / 300 + NVL ( YEARS , 0 ) + NVL ( MONTHS , 0 ) / 12 + NVL ( DAYS , 0 ) / 300 + NVL ( WEEKS , 0 ) / 52 + NVL ( TRIMESTERS , 0 ) / 4

dataSource.name: Q_73
dataSource.select: select t.text_description FREE_TXT from PEN_REPORT_FREE_TEXTS t where 1=1 and t.status = 1 and t.text_type = '1' and t.product_code_dependency = 9 --αφορά σε κατηγορία σύνταξης 1-γήρατος/2-αναπηρίας/3-θανάτου/5-παραπληγικά/9-ολες οι κατηγορίες ;

textSegment.string: 2.Έχοντας υπόψη τα στοιχεία του φακέλου από τα οποία προκύπτουν τα εξής :
ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΤΙΚΑ ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ - ΧΡΟΝΟΙ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΓΙΑ ΘΕΜΕΛΙΩΣΗ

formatException.label: ((:DESCRIPTION IS NOT NULL) or (:DESCRIPTION2 IS NOT NULL))
((:DESCRIPTION IS NOT NULL) or (:DESCRIPTION2 IS NOT NULL))

textSegment.string: ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΤΙΚΑ ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ - ΧΡΟΝΟΙ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΓΙΑ ΘΕΜΕΛΙΩΣΗ - ΕΛΛΑΔΑ
ΧΡΟΝΟΙ ΕΕ/ΔΙΜΕΡΩΝ ΣΥΜΒΑΣΕΩΝ ΜΟΝΟ ΓΙΑ ΥΠΟΛΟΓΙΣΜΟ
ΧΡΟΝΟΙ ΕΕ/ΔΙΜΕΡΩΝ ΣΥΜΒΑΣΕΩΝ ΜΟΝΟ ΓΙΑ ΥΠΟΛΟΓΙΣΜΟ
ΥΠΟΛΟΓΙΣΜΟΣ ΠΟΣΟΥ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΜΕ ΔΙΑΤΑΞΕΙΣ ΠΡΙΝ ΤΗΝ 13/05/2016
ΕΤΗ ΜΟΝΙΜΗΣ ΚΑΙ ΝOΜΙMΗΣ ΔΙΑΜOΝΗΣ ΣΤΗ ΕΛΛΑΔΑ :
ΕΤΗ ΜΟΝΙΜΗΣ ΚΑΙ ΝOΜΙMΗΣ ΔΙΑΜOΝΗΣ ΣΤΗ ΕΛΛΑΔΑ :
ΣΥΝΟΛΙΚΑ ΕΤΗ ΚΑΤΟΙΚΙΑΣ ΣΕ ΕΛΛΑΔΑ + ΕΕ/ΔΣ :
ΣΥΝΟΛΙΚΑ ΕΤΗ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΣΕ ΕΛΛΑΔΑ + ΕΕ/ΔΣ :
ΣΥΝΟΛΙΚΑ ΕΤΗ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΣΕ ΕΛΛΑΔΑ + ΕΕ/ΔΣ :
ΠΡΕΠΕΙ, ΣΥΜΦΩΝΑ ΜΕ ΤΙΣ ΔΙΑΤΑΞΕΙΣ ΤΟΥ ΑΡΘ.
ΤΟ ΔΕ ΕΠΙ ΠΛΕΟΝ ΠΟΣΟ ΤΗΣ ΠΡΟΣΑΥΞΗΣΗΣ ΤΕΚΝΩΝ ΑΝΕΡΧΕΤΑΙ ΣΕ
ΕΥΡΩ ΟΠΩΣ ΔΙΑΜΟΡΦΩΘΗΚΕ ΜΕ ΤΙΣ ΑΥΞΗΣΕΙΣ ΑΠΟ
ΑΝΑΣΤΕΛΛΟΥΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΚΑΤΑΒΟΛΗ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΑΠΟ
ΑΠΟ ΕΠΟΜΕΝΗΣ ΔΙΑΚΟΠΗΣ ΕΡΓΑΣΙΑΣ Η ΤΗ ΣΥΜΠΛΗΡΩΣΗ ΤΟΥ 55ΟΥ ΕΤΟΥΣ ΤΗΣ ΗΛΙΚΙΑΣ, ΤΟ ΚΑΤΑΒΑΛΛΟΜΕΝΟ ΠΟΣΟ
ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΔΙΑΜΟΡΦΩΝΕΤΑΙ ΜΗΧΑΝΟΓΡΑΦΙΚΑ, ΣΥΜΦΩΝΑ ΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΙΣΧΥΟΥΣΑ ΝΟΜΟΘΕΣΙΑ.

ΤΥΧΟΝ ΠΡΟΚΥΠΤΟΥΣΑ ΠΡΟΣΩΠΙΚΗ ΔΙΑΦΟΡΑ ΚΑΤ' ΕΦΑΡΜΟΓΗ ΤΗΣ ΠΑΡΑΓΡΑΦΟΥ 2 ΤΟΥ ΑΡΘΡΟΥ 94 ΤΟΥ Ν.4387/2016 ΘΑ ΥΠΟΛΟΓΙΣΤΕΙ ΚΑΙ ΘΑ ΚΑΤΑΒΛΗΘΕΙ ΜΗΧΑΝΟΓΡΑΦΙΚΑ,ΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΠΡΩΤΗ ΚΑΤΑΒΟΛΗ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΥΠΟΚΕΙΜΕΝΗ ΣΕ ΟΛΕΣ ΤΙΣ ΝΟΜΙΜΕΣ ΚΡΑΤΗΣΕΙΣ.
ΕΠΕΙΔΗ Ο ΑΝΩΤΕΡΩ ΣΥΝΕΧΙΖΕΙ ΕΡΓΑΖΟΜΕΝΟΣ ΤΟ ΚΑΤΑΒΑΛΛΟΜΕΝΟ ΠΟΣΟ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ, ΜΕΙΩΝΕΤΑΙ ΚΑΤΑ
60%, ΒΑΣΕΙ ΤΩΝ ΔΙΑΤΑΞΕΩΝ ΤΟΥ ΑΡΘΡΟΥ 20 ΤΟΥ Ν.4387/2016.
ΑΝΑΣΤΕΛΛΟΥΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΚΑΤΑΒΟΛΗ ΤΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΛΟΓΩ ΕΡΓΑΣΙΑΣ ΣΕ ΦΟΡΕΑ ΤΗΣ ΓΕΝΙΚΗΣ ΚΥΒΕΡΝΗΣΗΣ ΣΥΜΦΩΝΑ ΜΕ ΤΟ ΑΡΘΡΟ 20 ΤΟΥ Ν.4387/2016.
ΕΠΙΦΥΛΑΣΣΟΜΑΣΤΕ ΓΙΑ ΤΗΝ ΑΝΑΘΕΩΡΗΣΗ ΤΗΣ ΑΠΟΦΑΣΗΣ ΑΥΤΗΣ ΩΣ ΠΡΟΣ ΤΟΝ ΚΑΘΟΡΙΣΜΟ ΤΟΥ ΥΨΟΥΣ:
1.ΤΗΣ ΑΝΤΑΠΟΔΟΤΙΚΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΣΥΜΦΩΝΑ ΜΕ ΤΟ ΔΕΥΤΕΡΟ ΕΔΑΦΙΟ ΤΗΣ ΠΑΡ. 1 ΤΟΥ ΑΡΘΡΟΥ 30 ΤΟΥ Ν. 4387/2016, ΓΙΑ ΔΙΑΣΤΗΜΑ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΕΩΣ 31.12.2001.
Σε περίπτωση που εξακολουθείτε εργαζόμενος μετά την έναρξη της συνταξιοδότησης και ο εργοδότης σας ανήκει
στον ευρύτερο Δημόσιο τομέα υποχρεούστε να προσκομίσετε άμεσα την απόφαση συνταξιοδότησης στον
ΣΕ ΠΕΡΙΠΤΩΣΗ ΠΟΥ ΧΟΡΗΓΗΘΗΚΑΝ ΠΟΣΑ ΠΡΟΣΩΡΙΝΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ, ΘΑ ΓΙΝΕΙ ΣΥΜΨΗΦΙΣΜΟΣ ΜΕ ΤΑ ΠΟΣΑ
ΠΟΥ ΘΑ ΧΟΡΗΓΗΘΟΥΝ ΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΠΑΡΟΥΣΑ ΑΠΟΦΑΣΗ

Ο ασφαλισμένος είναι υποχρεωμένος να διατηρήσει, διαθέσιμα για έλεγχο, τα φυσικά παραστατικά που δεν έχει προσκομίσει στον e-ΕΦΚΑ, για χρονικό διάστημα δέκα (10) ετών απο την έναρξη ισχύος της παρούσας απόφασης από την έναρξη ισχύος του Ν. 4921/2022.
Σε περίπτωση που εξακολουθείτε εργαζόμενος μετά την έναρξη της συνταξιοδότησης και ο εργοδότης σας ανήκει στον ευρύτερο
Δημόσιο τομέα υποχρεούστε να προσκομίσετε άμεσα την απόφαση συνταξιοδότησης στον εργοδότη σας.
2.Έχοντας υπόψη τα στοιχεία του φακέλου από τα οποία προκύπτουν τα εξής :
ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΤΙΚΑ ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ - ΧΡΟΝΟΙ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΓΙΑ ΘΕΜΕΛΙΩΣΗ
ΧΡΟΝΟΙ ΕΕ/ΔΙΜΕΡΩΝ ΣΥΜΒΑΣΕΩΝ ΜΟΝΟ ΓΙΑ ΥΠΟΛΟΓΙΣΜΟ
ΥΠΟΛΟΓΙΣΜΟΣ ΠΟΣΟΥ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΜΕ ΔΙΑΤΑΞΕΙΣ ΠΡΙΝ ΤΗΝ 13/05/2016
ΕΤΗ ΜΟΝΙΜΗΣ ΚΑΙ ΝOΜΙMΗΣ ΔΙΑΜOΝΗΣ ΣΤΗ ΕΛΛΑΔΑ :
ΕΤΗ ΜΟΝΙΜΗΣ ΚΑΙ ΝOΜΙMΗΣ ΔΙΑΜOΝΗΣ ΣΤΗ ΕΛΛΑΔΑ :
ΣΥΝΟΛΙΚΑ ΕΤΗ ΚΑΤΟΙΚΙΑΣ ΣΕ ΕΛΛΑΔΑ + ΕΕ/ΔΣ :
ΣΥΝΟΛΙΚΑ ΕΤΗ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΣΕ ΕΛΛΑΔΑ + ΕΕ/ΔΣ :
ΣΥΝΟΛΙΚΑ ΕΤΗ ΑΣΦΑΛΙΣΗΣ ΣΕ ΕΛΛΑΔΑ + ΕΕ/ΔΣ :
Το παρόν φύλλο υπολογισμού δεν υπόκειται σε ένδικα μεσα

function CF_TROPOPIITIKI_DOCFormula return Char is CURSOR C1 IS Select Decode(B.document_code,'006','ΤΡΟΠΟΠΟΙΗΣΗΣ' ,'301','ΑΝΑΘΕΩΡΗΣΗΣ' ,'003','ΜΕΤΑΤΡΟΠΗΣ ΑΝΑΠ. ΣΕ ' ,'002','ΜΕΤΑΤΡΟΠΗΣ ΓΗΡ. ΣΕ ' ,SUBSTR(B.document_name,1,100) ) DOCUMENT_NAME, A.Document_Code From Wrk_In_Out A, WRK_DOCUMENTS B Where A.Protocol_Orgbra_Code = :PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE And A.Protocol_Year = :PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR And A.Protocol_No = :P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO And Nvl(A.Receive_Appl_Flg,'0') = '1' And A.Type_Flg = '1' And A.Status = '1' And A.Document_Code = B.Document_Code ;
begin OPEN C1; FETCH C1 INTO :CP_DOC_TROP, :CP_DOC_TROP_CODE; CLOSE C1; RETURN :CP_DOC_TROP; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN RETURN NULL; end;

function M_131FormatTrigger return boolean is begin
-- Automatically Generated from Report Builder. /* if :P_PRODINST IN (8,1204,1205,1256) AND (:MEDICAL_DISABILITY!=0 or :PENSION_DISABILITY!=0 or :DISABILITY_START_DATE!=0 or :DISABILITY_END_DATE!=0 or :SUM_INS_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL!=0) THEN return (TRUE); ELSE return (FALSE); END IF;*/ ---SPAP 21/04/2021 θα εμφανιζονται οι πληροφοριες οταν βρεθουν να εχουν στοιχεια αναπηριας if (:MEDICAL_DISABILITY!=0 or :PENSION_DISABILITY!=0 or :DISABILITY_START_DATE!=0 or :DISABILITY_END_DATE!=0 or :SUM_INS_DAYS_QUAL_FINAL!=0) THEN return (TRUE); ELSE return (FALSE); END IF; end;
